artifacts.summary: Analysis of how FMCSTransfer from Task 995 relates to dense algebraic completeness; identifies that direct instantiation for D=Rat is blocked by architectural constraints but recommends using DovetailedCoverage bridges instead

partial_progress.details: Full analysis of FMCSTransfer applicability completed. Primary recommendation: connect DovetailedCoverage has_future/has_past to ratFMCS via TimelineQuot bridges
